title: trifolium repens var. macrorrhizum
intro: Trifolium repens var. macrorrhizum, also known as the large-rooted white clover, is a perennial legume that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it effective in treating urinary tract issues and soothing skin irritations. The health benefits of Trifolium repens var. macrorrhizum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
